data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_Name_Description
data.value: Name of the Real-Time Control Model.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_LimitMemory_Description
data.value: Option to limit memory usage.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_UseSaveStateTimeRange_DisplayName
data.value: Use save state time range

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_UseSaveStateTimeRange_Description
data.value: Determines whether or not to write model states on specified time instances.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_SaveStateStartTime_DisplayName
data.value: Save state time range: start time

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_SaveStateStartTime_Description
data.value: Start writing model states when simulation time is equal or larger than this time.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_SaveStateStopTime_DisplayName
data.value: Save state time range: stop time

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_SaveStateStopTime_Description
data.value: Stop writing model states when simulation time is beyond this time.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_SaveStateTimeStep_DisplayName
data.value: Save state time range: time step interval

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_SaveStateTimeStep_Description
data.value: Write model state at each multiple of this time step after the 'Save state start time'.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_UseRestart_DisplayName
data.value: Use restart

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_UseRestart_Description
data.value: Use provided (restart) state as initial condition.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_WriteRestart_DisplayName
data.value: Write restart

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_WriteRestart_Description
data.value: Determines whether or not to write model states (can be used to restart from). On true, a state is written at the end of the model run.

data.name: Categories_General
data.value: General

data.name: Common_Name_DisplayName
data.value: Name

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_Category_RunParameters
data.value: Run parameters

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_DisplayName
data.value: Real-Time Control Model

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_LimitMemory_DisplayName
data.value: Limit memory

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_OutputTimeStep_Description
data.value: Determines at which interval the model output is written

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_OutputTimeStep_DisplayName
data.value: Output timestep

data.name: signal
data.value: ..\Resources\signal.png;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: RealTimeControlApplicationPlugin_Description
data.value: Allows to simulate Real-Time Control for models, such as D-Flow 1D.

data.name: RealTimeControlModel_BrokenDataItemLinkDetected
data.value: Broken DataItem link detected in Model:{0}, Controlgroup:{1}, at the {2} linked to ({3}).{4}Connection to {5} must be manually re-established.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_CoordinateSystem_Description
data.value: Coordinate system (geographic or projected) used for drawing.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelProperties_CoordinateSystem_DisplayName
data.value: Coordinate System

data.name: RealTimeControlXmlWriter_GetXmlTimeSeriesFromControlGroups_PIDRule__0__time_series_will_not_be_included_in_the_DIMR_XML_as_Set_Point_Type_is_not_TimeSeries
data.value: PIDRule {0} time series will not be included in the DIMR XML as "Set Point Type" is not "TimeSeries"

data.name: RealTimeControlXmlWriter_GetXmlTimeSeriesFromControlGroups_IntervalRule__0__time_series_will_not_be_included_in_the_DIMR_XML_as_Set_Point_Type_is_Signal
data.value: IntervalRule {0} time series will not be included in the DIMR XML as "Set Point Type" is "Signal"

data.name: RealTimeControlControlGroupValidator_SeriesHasTimestepsThatExceedModelStopTime
data.value: Series '{0}' in RTC control group '{1}' has one or more timesteps that exceed the model stop time {2}.

data.name: RealTimeControlControlGroupValidator_SeriesHasTimestepsThatPrecedeModelStartTime
data.value: Series '{0}' in RTC control group '{1}' has one or more timesteps that precede the model start time {2}.

data.name: RealTimeControlControlGroupValidator_SeriesTimesShouldMatchModelTimeStep
data.value: Series '{0}' in RTC control group '{1}': the amount of time steps is not a multiple of the model time step {2}.

data.name: RealTimeControlModel_ControlGroupsPropertyChanged_Unable_to_update_ControlGroup_name__all_ControlGroup_names_must_be_unique__0___1___has_been_reverted_back_to___2__
data.value: Unable to update ControlGroup name, all ControlGroup names must be unique!{0}'{1}' has been reverted back to '{2}'

data.name: RealTimeControlModelExtensions_MakeControlGroupNamesUnique_ControlGroup_names_for_Model__0__were_not_unique__1_Control_Groups_have_been_renamed_such_that_they_are_now_unique_
data.value: ControlGroup names for Model {0} were not unique.{1}Control Groups have been renamed such that they are now unique.

data.name: RealTimeControlModel_Merge_There_already_exists_a_ControlGroup_named__0__in_Model__1___ControlGroup__0__will_be_renamed_to__2_
data.value: There already exists a ControlGroup named {0} in Model {1}, ControlGroup {0} will be renamed to {2}

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlConverter_AddOutputAsInputForRelativeTimeRule_Output___0___is_input_for_rule___1____but_the_rule_could_not_be_found__See_file____2___
data.value: Output '{0}' is input for rule '{1}', but the rule could not be found. See file: '{2}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlConverter_AddOutputAsInputForRelativeTimeRule_Relative_Time_Rules_can_only_have_one_output_as_input__It_seems_that_rule___0___has_multiple_outputs_as_input__See_file____1___
data.value: Relative Time Rules can only have one output as input. It seems that rule '{0}' has multiple outputs as input. See file: '{1}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlConverter_AddOutputAsInputForRelativeTimeRule_When_getting_an_output_as_input_for_rule___0____the_output___1___could_not_be_found_in_the_file__See_file____2___
data.value: When getting an output as input for rule '{0}', the output '{1}' could not be found in the file. See file: '{2}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlConverter_FindCorrespondingControlGroupAndAddRule_For_Rule___0____corresponding_control_group___1___could_not_be_found__See_file___2_
data.value: For Rule '{0}', corresponding control group '{1}' could not be found. See file: {2}

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlConverter_FindCorrespondingControlGroupAndAddRule_Control_Group___0___already_contains_a_rule_with_name___1____Names_must_be_unique__See_file___2__
data.value: Control Group '{0}' already contains a rule with name '{1}'. Names must be unique. See file: {2}.

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlConverter_FindCorrespondingControlGroupAndAddCondition_For_Condition___0____corresponding_control_group___1___could_not_be_found__See_file___2_
data.value: For Condition '{0}', corresponding control group '{1}' could not be found. See file: {2}

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlConverter_FindCorrespondingControlGroupAndAddCondition_Control_Group___0___already_contains_a_condition_with_name___1____Names_must_be_unique__See_file___2__
data.value: Control Group '{0}' already contains a condition with name '{1}'. Names must be unique. See file: {2}.

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlReader_Read_File___0___does_not_exist_
data.value: File '{0}' does not exist.

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlReader_Read_Could_not_read_control_groups_from_file___0___
data.value: Could not read control groups from file '{0}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlReader_Read_File___0___seems_to_be_empty_
data.value: File '{0}' seems to be empty.

data.name: RealTimeControlDataConfigXmlReader_Read_Could_not_read_connection_points_from_file___0___
data.value: Could not read connection points from file '{0}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelXmlReader_Read_Directory___0___does_not_exist_
data.value: Directory '{0}' does not exist.

data.name: RealTimeControlRuntimeConfigXmlReader_Read_File___0___does_not_exist_
data.value: File '{0}' does not exist.

data.name: RealTimeControlRuntimeConfigXmlReader_Read_There_is_no_time_data_for_the_RTC_model_in_the_file___0____Time_data_is_set_with_default_values_
data.value: There is no time data for the RTC model in the file '{0}'. Time data is set with default values.

data.name: RealTimeControlTimeSeriesConnector_ConnectTimeSeries_Object_with_id___0___does_not_seem_to_be_a_Time_Rule_or_Time_Condition__See_file____1___
data.value: Object with id '{0}' does not seem to be a Time Rule or Time Condition. See file: '{1}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlTimeSeriesConnector_ConnectTimeSeries_Rule__with_id___0___does_not_seem_to_use_a_time_serie_as_setpoint__See_file____1___Therefore_the_time_serie_is_not_imported
data.value: Rule with id '{0}' does not seem to use a time serie as setpoint. See file: '{1}'. Therefore, the time serie is not imported.

data.name: RealTimeControlTimeSeriesSetter_For_interval_rule_with_id__0__there_is_no_time_data_found_in_file__1__for_setting_fixed_or_variable_setpoint_type_Setpoint_type_will_be_variable;;
data.value: For interval rule with id '{0}', there is no time data found in file '{1}' for setting fixed or variable setpoint type. Setpoint type will be variable.

data.name: RealTimeControlTimeSeriesXmlReader_Read_File___0___does_not_exist_
data.value: File '{0}' does not exist.

data.name: RealTimeControlToolsConfigComponentConnector_ConnectTimeRules_Could_not_find_Time_Rule_with_id___0____See_file____1___
data.value: Could not find Time Rule with id '{0}'. See file: '{1}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlToolsConfigComponentConnector_ConnectTimeRules_The_output_of_a_rule_should_be_an_output__tagged_with___0____See_file____1___
data.value: The output of a rule should be an output, tagged with '{0}'. See file: '{1}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlToolsConfigComponentConnector_ConnectRelativeTimeRules_Could_not_find_Relative_Time_Rule_with_id___0____See_file____1___
data.value: Could not find Relative Time Rule with id '{0}'. See file: '{1}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlToolsConfigComponentConnector_ConnectRelativeTimeRules_The_output_of_relative_time_rule___0___should_be_an_output__see_tag__Output____See_file____1___
data.value: The output of relative time rule '{0}' should be an output (see tag [Output]). See file: '{1}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlToolsConfigXmlReader_Read_File___0___does_not_exist_
data.value: File '{0}' does not exist.

data.name: RealTimeControlXmlReaderHelper_GetControlGroupByElementId_Could_not_find_the_controlgroup___0___that_is_referenced_in_id___1____The_group_needs_to_be_referenced_in_file___2___
data.value: Could not find the controlgroup '{0}' that is referenced in id '{1}'. The group needs to be referenced in file '{2}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlXmlReaderHelper_GetConnectionPointByName_Could_not_find_the_input_output___0____The_input_output_needs_to_be_referenced_in_file___1___
data.value: Could not find the input/output '{0}'. The input/output needs to be referenced in file '{1}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlXmlReaderHelper_ConnectInputToRule_Could_not_find_the_input_for_rule___0____in_control_group__1___The_input_needs_to_be_referenced_in_file___2___
data.value: Could not find the input for rule '{0}' in control group '{1}'. The input needs to be referenced in file '{2}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlXmlReaderHelper_ConnectInputToRule_Could_not_find_the_input_for_signal___0____in_control_group__1___The_input_needs_to_be_referenced_in_file___2___
data.value: Could not find the input for signal '{0}' in control group '{1}'. The input needs to be referenced in file '{2}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlXmlReaderHelper_ConnectOutputToRule_Could_not_find_the_output_for_rule___0____in_control_group__1___The_output_needs_to_be_referenced_in_file___2___
data.value: Could not find the output for rule '{0}' in control group '{1}'. The output needs to be referenced in file '{2}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlXmlReaderHelper_GetRuleByElementIdInControlGroup_Could_not_find_the_input_output___0___that_is_referenced_in_id___1____The_input_output_needs_to_be_referenced_in_file___2___
data.value: Could not find the input/output '{0}' that is referenced in id '{1}'. The input/output needs to be referenced in file '{2}'.

data.value: Could not find the condition '{0}'. The condition needs to be referenced in file '{1}'.

data.value: Could not find the rule '{0}' that is referenced in id '{1}'.The rule needs to be referenced in file '{2}'.

data.name: RealTimeControlXmlReaderHelper_GetSignalByElementIdInControlGroup_Could_not_find_the_signal___0___that_is_referenced_in_id___1___The_signal_needs_to_be_referenced_in_file___2___
data.value: Could not find the rule '{0}' that is referenced in id '{1}'.The rule needs to be referenced in file '{2}'.

data.value: There was an error reading the time series file: '{0}'. Please check file: {1}.

data.value: Hydraulic rule '{0}' must have an input. Please check file: '{1}'.

data.value: PID rule '{0}' must have a setpoint. Please check file: '{1}'.

data.value: Interval rule '{0}' must have a setpoint. Please check file: '{1}'.

data.value: Cannot find input with element ID '{0}' for rule '{1}'. Please check file: '{2}'.

data.value: Please note that Use Restart option in D-RTC is set to False.

data.value: Import time series for signals are not existing, export failed.

data.value: Interval rule '{0}' has empty time series.

data.value: Interval rule '{0}' requires 1 input.

data.value: Output item {0} has multiple Active Condition Paths: {1}.

data.value: Error changing the Name. The field cannot be empty. Please only use alphanumeric, spaces, underscores and dashes.

data.value: The D-Real Time Control model '{0}' was migrated to the newest version. If applicable, please verify the restart file settings.

data.value: An error occurred while deleting {0}: {1}

data.name: RealTimeControlModelImporter_OnImportItem_Target_null_expected
data.value: Null is expected, because target argument is unused.

data.name: RealTimeControlModelNodePresenter_OutputLocationWarningMessage
data.value: Output RTC rule already assigned to a different output. Are you sure you want to assign it?

data.value: Warning

data.value: An error occurred while writing file {0}: {1}

data.value: the migration of the D-RTC model

data.value: File does not exist: {0}

data.name: RealTimeControlModelXmlReader_GetXmlDirectory_Could_not_import_RTC_model_the_settings_json_file_should_contain_an_xml_directory
data.value: Could not import RTC model, the settings.json file should contain an xml directory.
